{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":279},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7476641571536978713","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看呐~哎呀他们都很可爱，个个死傲娇的很（可爱死是我了[偷笑]） 宋少爷跟他爸一个样，不听别人解释，不停的打断哈哈哈哈哈哈哈也太搞笑了吧 “他故意踩在一旁的雪上，鞋子与雪的摩擦，发出“吱嘎吱嘎”的细碎声响。”嘿嘿我跟他有共同的爱好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740797594,"group_id":"7232251599958051892","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"又是一个想当磕学家的一天🍿","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0gIGFiTjqkJNQK4ZGBBqkvrgy4ZtBCxc8kZ9O9iamed","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/54bc9d150d3144158cae371c3684518e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795779&x-signature=MhzwINhJClhjh%2FXNJxeaeFny4%2Bg%3D","user_id":"1398199870840573","user_name":"每天想沉浸在小说里"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1398199870840573","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1715517258,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7232251599958051892","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+电竞+强强+游戏背景架空】
【温柔腹黑宠溺大神×痞里痞气喷子队长】
四年前，安祯游戏主播CP火遍了大江南北。
两人凭借高超的游戏技术以及CP炒作的手法收获了一大批CP粉。
可就在事业上升期，两人忽然宣布分道扬镳。
四年后，SYX俱乐部新来了一个财神爷。
于是江祯在俱乐部又遇到了宋泊安。
“你当时为什么要忽然离开我？”
“或许是因为，我动心了吧。”
江祯不知道，对于宋泊安来说，他是他的救赎。
安祯强CP重组，双强联合，拿下了众多职业比赛冠军。
在某次比赛中，队内语音却被曝光。
“妈的这人怎么对着我打！”
“老婆别怕，有我在。”
“谁他妈你老婆！”
“谁骂谁是。”
众CP粉惊呆了。
妈妈！我嗑的电竞CP居然是真的！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o5b44ef3d31b6cdb1c5e21693e6baf6b4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"俊糖","author_id":"","book_id":"7232251599958051892","book_name":"磕糖！腹黑少爷的炸毛猫队长","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3850人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7232297423144813115","read_count":"3850","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"265385"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"129","tags":"双男主,现代,腹黑,强强,电竞,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1ef8c794693010354a6d128b750dab6a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449469&x-signature=escTmJYFpmjkMlLJtW%2FPjKRA62g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2239077372920702","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"160"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":34396,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":213 ,"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7480784018448122649","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这篇文章没有什么大起大落的情节，一切顺其自然，特别的温柔（我感觉作者大大是一个很温柔的人），这本小说给我的感觉是书距离我们很近（不知道为什么），总而言之很好看的，喜欢电竞文的可以冲，喜欢两个人热烈而又充满惊喜的感情的也可以冲。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741759677,"group_id":"7232251599958051892","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"所愿皆所得","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5RAVtPVxu4emxzRdd+UPH4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c8f922d4ff8c49e1ba315ad719b7a177~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789302&x-signature=HQh0XgRmTdoDjOgd9t8V0PvLvYk%3D","user_id":"411640917136692","user_name":"_爱吃-香菜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"411640917136692","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7232251599958051892","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+电竞+强强+游戏背景架空】
【温柔腹黑宠溺大神×痞里痞气喷子队长】
四年前，安祯游戏主播CP火遍了大江南北。
两人凭借高超的游戏技术以及CP炒作的手法收获了一大批CP粉。
可就在事业上升期，两人忽然宣布分道扬镳。
四年后，SYX俱乐部新来了一个财神爷。
于是江祯在俱乐部又遇到了宋泊安。
“你当时为什么要忽然离开我？”
“或许是因为，我动心了吧。”
江祯不知道，对于宋泊安来说，他是他的救赎。
安祯强CP重组，双强联合，拿下了众多职业比赛冠军。
在某次比赛中，队内语音却被曝光。
“妈的这人怎么对着我打！”
“老婆别怕，有我在。”
“谁他妈你老婆！”
“谁骂谁是。”
众CP粉惊呆了。

于是江祯在俱乐部又遇到了宋泊安。
“你当时为什么要忽然离开我？”
“或许是因为，我动心了吧。”
江祯不知道，对于宋泊安来说，他是他的救赎。
安祯强CP重组，双强联合，拿下了众多职业比赛冠军。

“妈的这人怎么对着我打！”
“老婆别怕，有我在。”
“谁他妈你老婆！”
“谁骂谁是。”
众CP粉惊呆了。
